name: ora
role: settings-ui

Filing: find-in-page in the redesigned settings points to nonsensical places. If
I open about:preferences and search "manage" in the box, a bunch of the yellow
arrows point to spots that aren't actionable and don't correspond to a real
result. The redesign seems to have broken where the indicators land.

Same area as the older tooltip-placement issues, but now via the settings search.
